data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of searching and filtering by custom fields. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for searching and filtering by custom fields, but there is no evidence of actual implementation or testing of this feature, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality that supports searching and filtering by custom fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for searching and filtering by custom fields
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows searching and filtering by custom fields as specified in the use case.
